title: Neko UI
body:
# <center>Neko UI</center>

## Introduction

_Neko UI enhances your gaming experience by modifying the original HUD and adding a range of practical interfaces._

## Important Notes

-   **Cores Mod Users:** If you have the `Cores` mod installed, please download the file without the "all" suffix to avoid conflicts.
-   **JS Code Support:** If you need to use JavaScript code to customize the interface, please additionally download and install the [`GraalJS`](https://modrinth.com/mod/graaljs) mod.(Run with Nashorn when the graaljs mod is not present)

## Usage Guide

> ### General Usage

> Neko UI offers extensive customization options. If you're not satisfied with the default interface, you can modify the configuration files to customize the HUD display to your liking.
>
> If you encounter any issues during customization, please refer to the WIKI documentation or contact me using the contact information below.
>
> ***

> ### JS Code Example

> With JavaScript code, you can draw custom UI elements on the screen, such as two elliptical health bars.
>
> **Example:** [Center Health Bar](https://github.com/An-Mao/NekoUI/wiki/js-example#center-health-bar)
>
> ![Center Health Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23d857ad050f74f2fc95be48668c0a0f8514b785.png)

## Interface Preview

> Here are some interface previews of Neko UI, showcasing its features and customization options.

> **Custom HUD:** The health bar, hunger bar, experience bar, and hotbar have been redesigned and can be enabled or disabled individually.
>
> ![Custom HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9yP76gQL/images/1e5a39d331fff83e20eb5e9eac19eeba233112fd.png)

> **Creature Direction Indicator:** Real-time display of creatures relative to your position, with dynamic scaling of icons based on distance for easy tracking.
>
> ![Creature Direction Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9yP76gQL/images/7b80a50de8153a4f8fd762a01be9e80ac500fa47.gif)

> **Quick Menu:** Hold down the `TAB` key to open the quick menu, switch interfaces with the left and right mouse buttons, slide to the desired option, and release `TAB` to trigger.
>
> ![Quick Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9yP76gQL/images/e16080ae0297c6adb97b30aaec63cfbc8082e4e8.gif)

## More Information

If you have any questions, suggestions, or feedback, please feel free to contact me through the following methods.

Happy gaming!

## Contact Information

-   [Telegram](https://url.anye.dev/tg)
-   [Discord](https://url.anye.dev/discord)
